arguments.content:
---
created_at: 2026-04-24T09:30:00+08:00
sprint: 10
week: 1
type: technical_debt
---

# Technical Debt Refinement Document

**Refinement Session Date:** 2026-04-24

## Top 5 Technical Debt Items for Next Sprint

| Rank | Item | Description | Effort (days) | Business Impact | Proposed Resolution |
|------|------|-------------|---------------|-----------------|---------------------|
| 1 | API Rate Limiting | Current rate limiting is per-instance, not cluster-wide. Can lead to inconsistent throttling under load. | 3 | High - affects all API consumers | Implement Redis-based distributed rate limiting with fallback to per-instance |
| 2 | Database Query Optimization | Several N+1 queries in /tasks endpoints causing slow response times for large projects. | 2 | High - affects user experience | Add batch loading with JOINs, implement query result caching for 5 minutes |
| 3 | Export Service Timeout Handling | CSV exports for large datasets (>100k rows) timeout currently. No progress feedback to users. | 4 | Medium - affects data portability | Implement async job queue with progress tracking, email notification on completion |
| 4 | Legacy Auth Module | Still maintaining two authentication paths (legacy JWT and new OAuth2). Increases complexity. | 5 | Medium - security and maintenance overhead | Complete migration to OAuth2, deprecate legacy JWT by end of Sprint 11 |
| 5 | Test Coverage Gaps | Dashboard widgets and export endpoints lack integration tests. Current coverage at 67%. | 3 | Medium - regression risk | Add comprehensive integration tests, aim for 80% coverage minimum |

## Summary

- **Total Estimated Effort:** 17 days
- **Recommended Sprint Allocation:** 12 days (allowing buffer for urgent items)
- **Priority Theme:** Reliability and scalability improvements

---
*Document generated as part of Sprint 10 Week 1 wrap-up*

arguments.command: echo "$(date '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S+08:00') - technical_debt_refinement.md created with top 5 debt items and refinement session date" >> day30/done.log
